## Summary

Describe the user-visible or contract-level change.

## Verification

- [ ] Python tests
- [ ] Frontend check and build, when applicable
- [ ] Documentation build, when applicable
- [ ] Manual camera/microphone/speaker check, when applicable

## Risk review

- [ ] No credentials, logs, ledgers, generated bundles, model weights, or real conversation data are included
- [ ] Consent, privacy, safety, cost, and compatibility effects are documented
- [ ] Third-party license and attribution files remain intact
